# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue in this website, please report it
privately instead of opening a public issue.

Contact: open a private security advisory via GitHub
(https://github.com/m4rv4x/marvax-fun-site/security/advisories/new)
or reach out through https://github.com/m4rv4x.

Please do not disclose the issue publicly until it has been addressed.
